description: Handles user sign-up, login, SSO, password management, and session security.
The main workspace overview showing projects, tasks, and activity widgets.
Creating, assigning, tracking, and organizing tasks and projects.
In-app, email, and push notifications for task and workspace activity.
Subscription plans, invoicing, payment methods, and plan changes.
Connections to third-party tools such as Slack, Jira, and Google Calendar.
Analytics, exports, and scheduled reporting on workspace activity.
iOS and Android apps for task management on the go.
